sourceTitle: AIツールの授業における利用について（ver. 1.0）
queryUsed: site:u-tokyo.ac.jp "生成AI" ポリシー OR ガイドライン
verificationNotes: HTTP 200, readable content. Official UTokyo policy (April 2023) on AI tools in classes. Detailed faculty guidance: test your assignments with ChatGPT, state your AI stance per class, explain learning goals, design AI-resistant assessments. Does not ban AI tools outright.
